original_snippet_context: Discussion of the "Convênio de Taubaté" and its relation to earlier valorization plans and the "sobretaxa" (surtax) on coffee.
relevant_quote: Caso no torno necessário o en- dossn ou Manca dn Inião para as operações de credito, serão observa das ns dlspo-di.ru-i do nrt. 1 ll. IU da lei n. ij:.: do ::o do dezembro do mur..
justification: This passage describes the "Convênio de Taubaté" and its stipulations regarding potential federal endorsement of credit operations for coffee valorization, without expressing a clear opinion on the Caixa de Conversão itself.
